notes: single-channel brushless ESC for a weapon motor; no BEC of its own — the brain's 5V typically comes from the drive ESC instead. 3-phase commutation happens inside the ESC and isn't modelled here (not SPICE) — from the battery's perspective this is checked the same way as any other motor driver: polarity, channel resolution, worst-case current budget, wire gauge.
description: The weapon's motor controller. Unlike the drive ESC, it only drives one motor (the spinner/hammer/lifter's weapon) and usually has no onboard 5V regulator of its own.
